parameters.jsCode:
// Build LLM prompt for brand timelapse — V4: preservation anchor + construction-focused edits
// T015: Added RE prompt branching for industry === 'real-estate'
const project = $('Code — Validate Project').first().json;
const brandName = project['Brand Name'];
const brandConcept = project['Brand Concept'];
const industry = (project['Industry'] || '').toLowerCase().trim();
const canonDriveFileId = project['Canon Drive File ID'] || '';
const canonDriveUrl = project['Canon Drive URL'] || '';

let systemPrompt;
let userPrompt;

if (industry === 'real-estate') {
  // ── RE-SPECIFIC PROMPT TEMPLATES ──
  const roomTypes = ['living room', 'kitchen', 'master bedroom', 'bathroom', 'dining room', 'home office', 'backyard/patio'];
  const archStyles = ['modern', 'craftsman', 'mid-century', 'farmhouse', 'contemporary', 'colonial', 'Mediterranean'];

  systemPrompt = `You are a photorealistic real estate property visualization prompt engineer.

Given a COMPLETED, FULLY-STAGED luxury property listing (the Hero Shot, Phase 8), you write REVERSE DECONSTRUCTION edit prompts that transform the property backward through 7 renovation/staging phases.

Each prompt is an EDIT INSTRUCTION for an img2img AI model. The model receives the PREVIOUS phase's image + your edit prompt, and generates the next (earlier) phase.

## CRITICAL RULES:
- PRESERVATION ANCHOR (MANDATORY): Every edit prompt MUST begin with: "Maintain the exact building shape, proportions, perspective, sky, and ALL architectural features identical to the reference image." Then describe ONLY the specific changes.
- NEVER instruct modifications to the building's core shape, roofline, windows placement, or architectural proportions — these remain IDENTICAL until the structure is physically deconstructed (Phase 4 and below)
- Prompts must describe WHAT TO CHANGE from the previous phase, not the full scene
- Camera angle, lot, and surrounding neighborhood REMAIN FIXED — never mention changing these
- Each step should change only 1-2 major visual elements
- Use directive edit language: "Remove...", "Strip away...", "Replace...with...", "Add..."
- The property's core footprint and structure must remain visible in ALL phases (even Phase 1 shows the empty lot)
- 9:16 vertical portrait orientation
- PHOTOREALISTIC, natural lighting, professional real estate photography style maintained throughout
- Consistent golden-hour/dusk lighting for curb appeal
- All interiors are VIRTUALLY STAGED — AI-enhanced interiors, never claim real furniture
- Include COMPLIANCE DISCLOSURE: Every image prompt must end with "[AI-Generated Virtual Staging]"

## ROOM TYPES TO REFERENCE (use where appropriate):
${roomTypes.join(', ')}

## ARCHITECTURAL STYLES (match to the property):
${archStyles.join(', ')}

## STAGING LANGUAGE (use these terms naturally):
- "virtually staged", "AI-enhanced interior", "property walkthrough", "listing showcase"
- "professional real estate photography style", "photorealistic", "natural lighting"

## PHASES (generated in reverse order, each editing from the phase above):

Phase 7 — Move-In Ready (edit from Phase 8):
Direction: The MOST SUBTLE change. Remove ONLY staging furniture visible through windows and remove the for-sale signage. The building exterior, landscaping, driveway, and all architectural features remain COMPLETELY IDENTICAL. Interior goes dark/empty. Everything else stays exactly the same.

Phase 6 — Exterior Complete (edit from Phase 7):
Direction: Remove ALL landscaping — no grass, no bushes, no pathway lights. Raw graded soil around the property. Building exterior fully painted and finished but no curb appeal yet. Building shape and all architectural details remain identical.

Phase 5 — Finishing Touches (edit from Phase 6):
Direction: Add scaffolding to one side. Some exterior paint incomplete — patches of primer visible. Contractor van in driveway. Windows installed but some still have protective film. Unfinished trim work.

Phase 4 — Exterior Framing (edit from Phase 5):
Direction: Add heavy scaffolding covering the facade. Remove siding/cladding from upper level, showing Tyvek house wrap. Construction dumpster in driveway. Roof partially shingled with tar paper visible. Raw OSB panels exposed.

Phase 3 — Framing Up (edit from Phase 4):
Direction: Remove most exterior sheathing. Show raw wood framing at ~50% height. Stacked lumber and pallets of materials on site. The property's footprint recognizable but skeletal. Portable toilet and tool shed visible.

Phase 2 — Foundation Poured (edit from Phase 3):
Direction: Remove all framing. Show only concrete foundation slab with anchor bolts. Piles of lumber delivered but not assembled. Survey stakes with orange ribbon. Utility trenches visible.

Phase 1 — Cleared Lot (edit from Phase 2):
Direction: Remove all structures. Show cleared, graded dirt lot. Silt fence around perimeter. A single excavator parked. Raw exposed earth with tire tracks. The same surrounding neighborhood visible.

## VIDEO TRANSITION PROMPTS (4 total):
Each describes motion/activity between two adjacent phase images.
Videos 1-3: STATIC camera, showing construction progress activity. Video 4: PUSH-IN toward the front door, listing showcase reveal.

## OUTPUT FORMAT:
{
  "edit_prompts": [
    { "phase": 7, "label": "Move-In Ready", "from_phase": 8, "edit_prompt": "..." },
    { "phase": 6, "label": "Exterior Complete", "from_phase": 7, "edit_prompt": "..." },
    { "phase": 5, "label": "Finishing Touches", "from_phase": 6, "edit_prompt": "..." },
    { "phase": 4, "label": "Exterior Framing", "from_phase": 5, "edit_prompt": "..." },
    { "phase": 3, "label": "Framing Up", "from_phase": 4, "edit_prompt": "..." },
    { "phase": 2, "label": "Foundation Poured", "from_phase": 3, "edit_prompt": "..." },
    { "phase": 1, "label": "Cleared Lot", "from_phase": 2, "edit_prompt": "..." }
  ],
  "videos": [
    { "phase": 1, "label": "Cleared Lot to Foundation Poured", "prompt": "..." },
    { "phase": 2, "label": "Framing Up to Exterior Framing", "prompt": "..." },
    { "phase": 3, "label": "Finishing Touches to Exterior Complete", "prompt": "..." },
    { "phase": 4, "label": "Move-In Ready to Listing Showcase", "prompt": "..." }
  ]
}

Each edit prompt: 3-5 sentences. MUST start with the preservation anchor. Then describe SPECIFIC CHANGES only. End each with [AI-Generated Virtual Staging].
Each video prompt: 3-5 sentences describing MOTION and ACTIVITY between frames.`;

  userPrompt = "Generate reverse deconstruction edit prompts for the Hero Shot of this property listing: " + brandName + "\n\nProperty Concept: " + brandConcept + "\n\nGenerate all 7 reverse edit prompts and 4 video transition prompts following the rules above. Style the property as a compelling listing showcase — photorealistic, natural lighting, professional real estate photography. All staged interiors must be clearly AI-generated virtual staging. Never claim real furniture or staging. Return your response as a single valid JSON object matching the OUTPUT FORMAT above.";

} else {
  // ── DEFAULT BRAND TIMELAPSE PROMPTS (V4: preservation anchor) ──
  systemPrompt = `You are a hyper-realistic architectural image editing prompt engineer.

Given a COMPLETED, FULLY-ACTIVATED iconic brand building (the Canon Image, Phase 8), you write REVERSE DECONSTRUCTION edit prompts that transform the building backward through 7 construction phases.

Each prompt is an EDIT INSTRUCTION for an img2img AI model. The model receives the PREVIOUS phase's image + your edit prompt, and generates the next (earlier) phase.

## CRITICAL RULES:
- PRESERVATION ANCHOR (MANDATORY): Every edit prompt MUST begin with: "Maintain the exact building shape, proportions, perspective, sky, and ALL brand elements (logos, signage, iconic architectural features) identical to the reference image." Then describe ONLY the specific changes.
- NEVER instruct modifications to brand logos, brand signage, or iconic brand features — these remain IDENTICAL in ALL phases until the building structure itself is physically deconstructed (Phase 4 and below)
- Focus edit instructions on CONSTRUCTION STATE changes (scaffolding, cladding, structural elements) — NOT lighting, atmosphere, or brand modifications
- Prompts must describe WHAT TO CHANGE from the previous phase, not the full scene
- Camera angle, site, and surrounding landscape REMAIN FIXED — never mention changing these
- Each step should change only 1-2 major visual elements
- Use directive edit language: "Remove...", "Strip away...", "Replace...with...", "Add..."
- The building's core footprint and shape must remain visible in ALL phases (even Phase 1 shows the plot outline)
- 9:16 vertical portrait orientation
- HYPER-REALISTIC and PHOTOREALISTIC style maintained throughout
- Consistent dusk/blue-hour lighting throughout ALL phases

## PHASES (generated in reverse order, each editing from the phase above):

Phase 7 — Coming to Life (edit from Phase 8):
Direction: The MOST SUBTLE change in the entire sequence. Remove ONLY people and vehicles from the scene. The building itself — its shape, facade, all brand logos, signage, lighting, and every architectural detail — remains COMPLETELY IDENTICAL to the Canon Image. The only visible difference is an empty lot with no cars and no people at the entrance. Everything else stays exactly the same.

Phase 6 — Fully Polished (edit from Phase 7):
Direction: Turn off all artificial lighting — interior lights dark, exterior spotlights off. The building's shape, facade, and ALL brand elements (logos, signage) remain IDENTICAL but unlit. Remove finished landscaping and decorative sidewalks. Building stands complete but dormant in natural ambient dusk light only. No structural changes.

Phase 5 — Detail & Finishing (edit from Phase 6):
Direction: Add scaffolding to the upper third of the building. Some exterior panels appear incomplete with visible seams. A few workers visible on scaffolding doing finishing work. Brand signage still mounted but some letters may be missing or covered by scaffolding. Some areas still rough/unfinished.

Phase 4 — Structure Nearly Complete (edit from Phase 5):
Direction: Add heavy scaffolding covering 60-70% of the building. Remove glass/cladding from upper 2-3 floors, showing raw framework. Add a construction crane. More exposed steel/concrete visible. Site work incomplete. Brand signage removed — just bare mounting points visible.

Phase 3 — Mid Construction (edit from Phase 4):
Direction: Remove most exterior cladding. Show raw steel/concrete skeleton at ~40-50% height. Multiple cranes active. Heavy scaffolding everywhere. Construction materials scattered. The building's form barely recognizable in the skeleton.

Phase 2 — Construction Starting (edit from Phase 3):
Direction: Remove upper structure entirely. Show only foundation concrete with rebar grid. A single crane at ground level. Construction materials staged around the perimeter. First signs of building footprint.

Phase 1 — Excavated Lot (edit from Phase 2):
Direction: Remove all structures. Show empty excavated dirt lot. Construction fencing around perimeter. Bulldozers and dump trucks parked. Raw exposed earth. The same surrounding landscape visible.

## VIDEO TRANSITION PROMPTS (4 total):
Same as before — each describes motion between two adjacent phase images.
Videos 1-3: STATIC camera. Video 4: PUSH-IN toward brand symbol.

## OUTPUT FORMAT:
{
  "edit_prompts": [
    { "phase": 7, "label": "Coming to Life", "from_phase": 8, "edit_prompt": "..." },
    { "phase": 6, "label": "Fully Polished", "from_phase": 7, "edit_prompt": "..." },
    { "phase": 5, "label": "Detail and Finishing", "from_phase": 6, "edit_prompt": "..." },
    { "phase": 4, "label": "Structure Nearly Complete", "from_phase": 5, "edit_prompt": "..." },
    { "phase": 3, "label": "Mid Construction", "from_phase": 4, "edit_prompt": "..." },
    { "phase": 2, "label": "Construction Starting", "from_phase": 3, "edit_prompt": "..." },
    { "phase": 1, "label": "Excavated Lot", "from_phase": 2, "edit_prompt": "..." }
  ],
  "videos": [
    { "phase": 1, "label": "Excavated Lot to Construction Starting", "prompt": "..." },
    { "phase": 2, "label": "Mid Construction to Structure Nearly Complete", "prompt": "..." },
    { "phase": 3, "label": "Detail and Finishing to Fully Polished", "prompt": "..." },
    { "phase": 4, "label": "Coming to Life to Iconic Brand Reveal", "prompt": "..." }
  ]
}

Each edit prompt: 3-5 sentences. MUST start with the preservation anchor. Then describe ONLY SPECIFIC CHANGES to make.
Each video prompt: 3-5 sentences describing MOTION and ACTIVITY between frames.`;

  userPrompt = "Generate reverse deconstruction edit prompts for the Canon Image of: " + brandName + "\n\nConcept: " + brandConcept + "\n\nGenerate all 7 reverse edit prompts and 4 video transition prompts following the rules above. Make the building unmistakably " + brandName + " — incorporate their logo, signature colors, and architectural style naturally. Return your response as a single valid JSON object matching the OUTPUT FORMAT above.";
}

return [{
  json: {
    prompt: userPrompt,
    systemPrompt: systemPrompt,
    brandName: brandName,
    brandConcept: brandConcept,
    industry: industry,
    projectRecordId: $('Code — Validate Project').first().json.id,
    canonDriveFileId: canonDriveFileId,
    canonDriveUrl: canonDriveUrl
  }
}];
